Vendored from https://github.com/txodds/tx-on-chain

- `idl/txoracle.json` — mainnet Solana program IDL
- `idl/txoracle-devnet.json` — devnet IDL (`examples/devnet/idl/txoracle.json` upstream)
- `types/txoracle.ts` — generated TypeScript types

Do not edit these files manually. Update by re-downloading from upstream when TxODDS releases changes.
